heading: Create the MongoDB Vector Search Index
body:
> **Example:** This index definition indexes the `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field as the
> `vector` type with automatic binary `quantization` enabled
> and the `genres` field as the `filter` type in a MongoDB Vector Search
> index. The `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field contains embeddings created
> using Voyage AI's `voyage-3-large` embedding model. The
> index definition specifies `2048` vector dimensions and measures
> distance using `dotProduct` similarity function.
